title: Anchor Billing and Plans Requirements
summary: Defines Anchor's Free vs Pro plans, Daily Conversation Minute billing unit, Stripe subscription lifecycle, and gentle exhaustion/upgrade handling.
notes: Clear PRD: path under **/requirements/**, '-requirements.md' suffix, and content uses numbered requirements (BPR-001..BPR-011) each with explicit '**Requirement:**' + '**Acceptance criteria:**', plus in-scope/out-of-scope (goals/non-goals) sections. Document references ADR 0005 and ADR 0002 as upstream sources but is itself requirements, not a decision record.
